comment.body:
(so only bcs the net speed profile is negative, it won't automatically imply that the net vanna profile is also negative)
bcs vanna has different sensitivity for time than speed, and it changes differently across the chain.
this week is a good example: net weekly speed is negative, but vanna is positive, below a certain vol level

comment.body:
bcs a left-skewed (negative skewed) distribution means liquidity upward, illiquidity downward.
the body of the histogram is upward, those are the spot levels whose frequency is higher,
while the tail is downward, bcs those are the spot levels whose frequency is lower
